dungeon.jp: 飛天の塔【ベリーハード】1階

description.en: Attacks an enemy and increases the <color=#28d9ed>Priority</color> of the caster by <color=#28d9ed>20%</color>.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、自分の<color=#28d9ed>行動ゲージ</color>を<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>UPさせる。
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并使自身<color=#28d9ed>行动值</color>提升<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>。

description.en: Removes <color=#28d9ed>1</color> buff(s) from targets not inflicted with Frozen, then attacks all enemies. Increases damage dealt to targets inflicted with Frozen.
description.jp: 凍結がない対象の強化効果を<color=#28d9ed>1個</color>解除した後、敵全体にダメージを与える。このスキルは凍結がある対象に与えるダメージがUPする。
description.kr: 빙결이 없는 대상들의 강화 효과를 <color=#28d9ed>1개</color> 해제 후 적 전체를 공격합니다. 이 스킬로 빙결 대상에게 입히는 피해가 증가합니다.
description.zh: 解除未处于冰冻状态目标的<color=#28d9ed>1个</color>强化效果后,攻击全体敌人。该技能对处于冰冻状态的目标造成的伤害提升。

description.en: Attacks all enemies.\nAfter attacking, has a <color=#28d9ed>70%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Frozen</color> on all enemies for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color> and has a <color=#28d9ed>70%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Reduced Speed</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.\nRight after using this skill, does not trigger an enemy's Counterattack, Revenge, or Agile Response.
description.jp: 敵全体にダメージを与える。\n攻撃後、敵全体に<color=#28d9ed>70%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>凍結</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間付与し、<color=#28d9ed>70%</color>の確率で敵全体の<color=#28d9ed>スピード</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間DOWNさせる。\nこのスキルでは敵の反撃、復讐、迅速対応が発動しない。
description.kr: 적 전체를 공격합니다.\n공격 후 적 전체에게 <color=#28d9ed>70%</color> 확률로 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>빙결</color>을 부여하고, <color=#28d9ed>70%</color> 확률로 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>속도 감소</color>를 부여합니다.\n이 스킬 직후에는 적의 반격, 복수, 신속 대응이 발동하지 않습니다.
description.zh: 攻击全体敌人。\n攻击后,有<color=#28d9ed>70%</color>的几率对全体敌人造成<color=#28d9ed>冰冻</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>,并有<color=#28d9ed>70%</color>的几率造成<color=#28d9ed>速度降低</color>,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。\n此技能发动后,不会触发敌人的反击、复仇、迅速应对效果。
